title: 20-year no-dollar-limit system warranty for modified bituminous membrane roofing
conditions: Membrane system shall be installed by manufacturer-authorized applicator
Manufacturer's representative shall inspect installation at completion
All components shall be from single manufacturer's system
Roof maintenance program shall be maintained for warranty duration
Owner shall provide manufacturer access for annual inspection during first two years
exclusions: Damage caused by others including but not limited to mechanical trades, window washers, and antenna installers
Damage from acts of God including hurricane, tornado, earthquake, and hail exceeding 1.75 inch diameter
Consequential damages including interior damage from leaks
Ponding water in areas not designed for positive drainage
Alterations or penetrations made without manufacturer's written authorization
notes: NDL system warranty covers complete waterproofing integrity of the roof system for 20 years from date of substantial completion. Warranty is non-prorated for full duration. Manufacturer is responsible for 100% of material and labor costs for warranty repairs. Warranty is transferable to subsequent building owners with written notice to manufacturer within 30 days of transfer.
